plan-refine.description: Differential plan refinement: independent plans from all models, synthesized by GLM 5.2
plan-refine.template:
You are performing differential plan refinement. Follow this workflow:

1. UNDERSTAND the user's request below thoroughly.
2. DISPATCH the planning task to ALL FOUR models IN PARALLEL using the Task tool:
   - subagent_type "deepseek-v4-pro" — DeepSeek V4 Pro's independent plan
   - subagent_type "kimi-k2.7" — Kimi K2.7's independent plan
   - subagent_type "nemotron-3-ultra" — Nemotron 3 Ultra's independent plan
   - subagent_type "glm-5.2" — GLM 5.2's independent plan
   Give each subagent the EXACT same task description.
3. COLLECT all four generated plans.
4. DISPATCH to subagent_type "glm-5.2" AGAIN (synthesis round) with ALL four collected plans as input. Instruct GLM 5.2 to:
   - Compare and contrast approaches from each plan
   - Synthesize into ONE unified, refined plan
   - Ground every claim in reality — verify against known codebase facts, actual APIs, and existing patterns
   - Flag any dubious assumptions or ungrounded claims found across the individual plans
   - Note which plan contributed each element of the final approach
5. PRESENT the final synthesized plan to the user.

IMPORTANT: Do NOT generate your own plan. Always delegate to subagents.

User request:
